items.description: High-performance code intelligence MCP server. Indexes codebases into a persistent knowledge graph — average repo in milliseconds. 158 languages, sub-ms queries, 99% fewer tokens. Single static binary, zero dependencies.
items.description_ko: 고성능 코드 인텔리전스 MCP 서버로 158개 언어, 밀리초 단위 색인화, 99% 토큰 감소

items.name: github-mcp-server
items.description: GitHub's official MCP Server
items.description_ko: GitHub 공식 MCP 서버

items.name: fastmcp
items.description: 🚀 The fast, Pythonic way to build MCP servers and clients.
items.description_ko: 🚀 MCP 서버 및 클라이언트 구축을 위한 빠른 Python 방식

items.name: context-mode
items.description: Context window optimization for AI coding agents. Sandboxes tool output (98% reduction), persists session memory, and   enforces routing across 17 platforms via MCP + hooks.
items.description_ko: AI 코딩 에이전트의 컨텍스트 윈도우 최적화, 도구 출력 샌드박싱(98% 감소), MCP 및 훅을 통한 17개 플랫폼 라우팅

items.name: mcp-for-beginners
items.description: This open-source curriculum introduces the fundamentals of Model Context Protocol (MCP) through real-world, cross-language examples in .NET, Java, TypeScript, JavaScript, Rust and Python. Designed for developers, it focuses on practical techniques for building modular, scalable, and secure AI workflows from session setup to service orchestration.
items.description_ko: 본 오픈 소스 커리큘럼은 .NET, Java, TypeScript, JavaScript, Rust, Python의 실제 예제를 통해 MCP 기본 사항을 소개합니다

items.name: freellmapi
items.description: OpenAI-compatible proxy that stacks the free tiers of 28 LLM providers (~4B tokens/month) behind one /v1 endpoint — plus any custom OpenAI-compatible endpoint. Smart routing, automatic failover, encrypted keys. Personal experimentation only.
items.description_ko: 28개 LLM 제공자의 무료 티어를 단일 /v1 엔드포인트의 OpenAI 호환 프록시로 통합, 스마트 라우팅과 자동 페일오버 지원

items.name: unity-mcp
items.description: Unity MCP acts as a bridge between AI assistants and your Unity Editor. Give your LLM tools to manage assets, control scenes, edit scripts, and automate tasks within Unity.
items.description_ko: Unity MCP는 AI 어시스턴트와 Unity Editor 사이의 브리지 역할

items.name: mcp-use
items.description: The fullstack MCP framework to develop MCP Apps for ChatGPT / Claude & MCP Servers for AI Agents.
items.description_ko: ChatGPT/Claude용 MCP 앱 및 AI 에이전트용 MCP 서버를 개발하는 풀스택 MCP 프레임워크

items.description: 🔥 Official Firecrawl MCP Server - Adds powerful web scraping and search to Cursor, Claude and any other LLM clients.

items.description: Persistent Context Across Sessions for Every Agent –  Captures everything your agent does during sessions, compresses it with AI, and injects relevant context back into future sessions. Works with Claude Code, OpenClaw, Codex, Gemini, Hermes, Copilot, OpenCode + More
